blindspots: **SKM Anthropic stake exact % (Indicator #3)** — single largest hidden-input variable. Diluted from 0.7% (Aug 2023) to 0.3-0.7% range. Resolution: SKM Q1 2026 earnings ~early May 2026 OR Anthropic S-1 cap table. Until disclosed, all stake-value math has ±50% uncertainty band.

**SKM accounting treatment of Anthropic stake gains (P&L vs OCI)** — affects whether earnings-event catalyst fires on markup or is insulated. If OCI: stake markup does NOT flow through P&L → market may under-react; if P&L: full earnings amplification. Resolution: Q1 2026 earnings disclosure.

**SKM pro-rata rights / anti-dilution provisions in Anthropic cap table** — critical for T4a stake-dilution bear risk. Pre-IPO mega-rounds (Series H/I plausible) may dilute further if SKM does not participate. SKM has not publicly committed to participate. No public visibility into Anthropic Series A-G investor-rights agreements.

**Anthropic IPO actual timing (Indicator #2)** — public estimates range Q4 2026 (The Information optimistic) to Mar 2027+ (FutureSearch median) to H2 2027 (bear). 12-month TRADE time-stop overlaps IPO uncertainty tail — primary catalyst could miss the window. No high-confidence forward signal until S-1 filing.

**Anthropic secondary-market true clearing price** — $800B ask declined Apr 2026 means there is a transactable price below $800B but above $380B that buyers and sellers will agree on. Tender offers and SPV pricing lag and are thin. Real clearing price unknown until next transacted print.

**Korean tax treatment of stake gains for SKM** — Korean Corporate Tax + AMT structure on unrealized gains differs from US GAAP. Could materially affect post-tax stake value reflected in book equity. Resolution: SKM 20-F or local Korean filings.

**Western sell-side timing of explicit SOTP modeling (Indicator #7)** — when major US firms (GS, MS, JPM, Citi) publish explicit Anthropic-stake SOTP, V2 Crowding may flip from PARTIAL to FAIL. No reliable lead indicator — depends on idiosyncratic analyst initiative.

cyclical.name: Anthropic secondary-market activity (tender offers, SPV pricing)

noiseFilter: **AI sector daily share-price moves** — SKM is in AI Disruption theme but its trade thesis is binary on Anthropic re-valuation, NOT general AI sentiment. NVDA / Meta / Microsoft / OpenAI news without direct Anthropic mention is noise. Only Anthropic-specific news (rounds, IPO, partnerships, model launches) moves the thesis.

**Korean retail-investor sentiment / KOSPI / Kospi200** — SKM 017670.KS is a large-cap Korean telco; index flows drag price without thesis implication. Only act when SKM diverges from Kospi200 by >2σ over 2+ weeks AND a thesis-relevant indicator (#1, #2, #3) has moved.
**General tech / FAANG sell-offs** — Stock will correlate with broad tech beta. Beta-driven moves of 3-5% are noise. Only act on price moves crossing MTM triggers (#4: ±15% / $32.83 / $44.41).

**Anthropic model launches / capability announcements** — Claude 4.x release cadence is product news, not valuation news. Unless a launch directly triggers a primary or secondary transaction (#1) or an IPO-timing change (#2), it is product noise. Long-term capability = primary-round pricing, but only at the round.

**Polymarket / prediction-market noise on IPO timing** — Polymarket and similar markets are thin and reflect retail sentiment more than insider information. Act only on FutureSearch / The Information / Bloomberg-sourced analyst consensus shifts, NOT prediction-market daily moves.

**SK Group corporate announcements unrelated to AI / SKM stake** — Chey Tae-won divorce, SK Hynix capex, SK Innovation refining — these are SK Group sibling-entity news. Only SK Telecom-specific announcements OR Anthropic-stake-affecting transactions move SKM's TRADE thesis.

**Sell-side telco-core PT changes** — Most US sell-side firms model SKM as a Korean telco at 6-7x EV/EBITDA without Anthropic stake explicit. PT changes that don't reference Anthropic stake (#7) are telco-core noise. Only react to PT changes that explicitly cite the stake.
